app.title: PolyChat — Chat with Your Documents
app.subtitle: Chat with PDFs, CSVs, TXTs, websites, and YouTube videos.
banner.persist_found: A persisted index was found in {path}.
banner.confirm_reset: This will permanently delete the persisted index. Are you sure?
dialog.replace_append.body: A persisted index already exists. How should the new documents be incorporated?
dialog.mismatch.body: The persisted index was built with embedder '{stored}', but the current embedder is '{current}'. Reset and rebuild to continue, or change the embedder back to the original.
chat.not_ready: Load a source and click 'Initialize RAG' to begin.
status.ready: RAG is ready. Ask a question below.
status.appended: New documents added to the existing index.
errors.no_transcript: This video does not have a transcript available.
errors.video_unavailable: This video is unavailable (private, deleted, or restricted).
errors.ip_blocked: YouTube blocked this request. Try setting YT_PROXY_HTTP/HTTPS in .env.
errors.age_restricted: This video is age-restricted and cannot be fetched without authentication.
errors.missing_api_key: Missing API key for {provider}. Set it in .env.
errors.no_source: Please provide at least one file or a URL before initializing.
errors.invalid_url: That does not look like a valid {kind} URL.
errors.ollama_unreachable: Cannot reach Ollama at {url}. Run `ollama serve`.
errors.ollama_model_not_found: Model '{model}' not found in Ollama. Pull it first: ollama pull {model}
errors.reset_rebuild_no_source: Index cleared. Upload a source and click Initialize RAG to rebuild.
